perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a shot of an office worker sitting with her back to the camera, wearing a brown jacket. A white sign with Chinese text is taped to her back. (2) The camera cuts to another individual, a male in a navy shirt, also seen from behind with a similar sign taped to his back in an office setting. (3) Transitions to a female staff member at a desk drinking from a yellow mug; a sign is propped up in front of her laptop. (4) Scene shifts to another woman in a denim jacket with her back turned, displaying a sign. (5) A woman in a blue and black uniform is seen looking at her smartphone with a sign placed on her chair. (6) A woman sits at a desk with a pile of clothes nearby, drinking coffee from a paper cup with a sign in front of her. (7) The final shot shows two women at their desks with signs on their backs, one identifying herself and the other pointing to the person behind her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and whimsical circus-style instrumental music starts immediately. No vocals are present. (2) The same high-energy, comedic background music continues at a steady volume and tempo as the visual scenes cut between different people. (3) The music maintains its loop without any ambient noise or sound effects until the video ends. No human speech is detected throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：社交能力0%' (Decorative/Hook Text): Appears at the top, setting the humorous theme of having zero social skills. (2) '沒事不要叫我 有事的話找別人' (Decorative Text): On a sign, translating to 'Don't call me if nothing's wrong, if something's wrong find someone else.' (3) '倉庫都委外了 還不下單快一點' (Decorative Text): On a sign regarding warehouse and ordering. (4) '別再問我有沒有新品 你們不買我怎麼出' (Decorative Text): On a sign about new products and sales. (5) '找我的話去官方IG留言 依時間順序回覆 不要插隊' (Decorative Text): On a sign regarding social media contact and queuing. (6) '我沒有在玩手機 我是在剪片' (Decorative Text): On a sign clarifying phone use as video editing work. (7) '咖啡先來十杯 不然我沒辦法工作' (Decorative Text): On a sign expressing a need for coffee to work. (8) '我是kiki 不是大姐姐' (Decorative Text): On a sign identifying a person's name. (9) '我妹在後面 不要找錯人' (Decorative Text): On a sign directing queries to another person.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Compilation of office workers displaying 'anti-social' signs.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple individual coworkers are shown sequentially at their respective office desks.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Various office workers wearing casual hoodies, denim jackets, and professional-casual tops.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright office environment containing desks, laptop computers, office chairs, shelves, mugs, and miscellaneous items like clothing and storage bins.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous commentary on workplace introversion. By using physical signs as proxies for the internal monologues of 'anti-social' office workers, it creates a relatable comedic scenario for viewers who might feel similarly overwhelmed by social demands at work. The objective is to drive engagement through relatable humor.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of POV framing and printed signs as a comedic prop.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video taps into the 'introvert culture' trend on social media, using exaggerated hostility toward social interaction for comedic effect.
